title: S.P.I.T.: Squeegee Punks In Traffic
overview: We follow Roach, a 17-year-old ex-junkie and squeegee punk living on the streets of Toronto and Montreal.  As part of the filmmaking process, he's been given a camera to document his world. The footage he gets is urgent, because there's a war against squeegee kids. This documentary is from the point of view of the kids themselves, in order to provide alternative voices. Roach's camera is positioned behind "enemy" lines: living in derelict buildings, squeegeeing for money, being hunted by police.
